issue_sections.name: description
issue_sections.purpose: Summarize the feature objective, user impact, and expected outcome.

issue_sections.name: context
issue_sections.purpose: Capture constraints, dependencies, and historical context needed to implement safely.

issue_sections.name: scope
issue_sections.purpose: Define touched files, integration boundaries, and explicit non-goals for this feature slice.

issue_sections.name: acceptance_criteria
issue_sections.purpose: List deterministic completion checks for functional behavior and constraints.

issue_sections.name: technical_notes
issue_sections.purpose: Record implementation choices, architecture constraints, and migration behavior.

issue_sections.name: testing_strategy
issue_sections.purpose: Specify targeted and integration tests that protect regressions for the feature.

issue_sections.name: edge_cases
issue_sections.purpose: Enumerate malformed input, fallback, and boundary-condition handling.

issue_sections.name: example_usage
issue_sections.purpose: Provide concise operator/user-facing examples demonstrating expected behavior.

issue_sections.name: references
issue_sections.purpose: Link source files, plans, and issues needed for implementation and review.
